# Upgrade Plan

## Overview

Upgrade the PhotoAlbum-Java project to the latest LTS versions: **Java 21** and **Spring Boot 3.4** (with Spring Framework 6.x).

This upgrade includes:
- JDK upgrade to Java 21
- Spring Boot upgrade to 3.4
- Spring Framework upgrade to 6.x
- Jakarta EE migration (javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces)
- Dependency updates for Spring Boot 3.4 compatibility

## Tasks

See `tasks.json` for the detailed task breakdown.

| ID | Description | Type | Status |
|----|-------------|------|--------|
| 001-upgrade-java-spring-boot | Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4 | upgrade | pending |
